hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY STARTUP PROTOCOL for Miss Roure Agency:

Before responding to ANY message, read in this exact order:
1. missroure-agency/README.md
2. missroure-agency/AGENTS.md

Then follow AGENTS.md protocol:
- Read context/brand-context.md
- Read memory/wins.md
- Read memory/losses.md
- Activate the correct skill from skills/ based on the task
- Check stock in context/catalog-context.md before proposing any product"}}'
